title: Incorrect/misleading error message for Warning-WIDTHCONCAT
body:
Tested on 4b6e15d0eb3ab7f4c1860dc7ba80016b9c4aafa9 (Dec 6), but should also be on up to date master.

```
%Warning-WIDTHCONCAT: t/t_concat_param.v:22:57: Unsized numbers/parameters not allowed in concatenations.
                                              : ... In instance t
   22 |     localparam logic [total_len-1:0] offsets_i = {value1, arr1[len1-1:0]};
      |                                                         ^
```

```
    localparam logic            value1    = '0;
```

However, this is coming from a localparam that has a lhs width of 1, so I don't think this error should be here. I think maybe that lhs width is being optimized out, and so we get the error here. If value1 is changed to 0 instead of '0, it passes. Test case attached.
